feed.title: PixCull
feed.description: Local-first AI photo culling for pros.

releases.release_notes:
What's new in 0.7

  • A/B 比较窗 LR Compare-style 重设计
  • Annotation rubric modal 视觉星条 + cull-reason 内嵌
  • 5k+ 张大批量稳定性 audit · IndexedDB 迁移
  • Loupe RGB 像素读数
  • Inspector 移动端 bottom-sheet
  • 视图预设 v2(JSON export/import + starter presets)
  • 客户分享链接 (/share/<run>/<token>)
  • 风格 clone V1 — 学个人偏好
  • Tethered live scoring — 现场实时分析
  • 历史时间线 (/history)

v0.6 — UI/UX 收尾

  • Left Library panel (LR Library pattern)
  • Inspector pane LR Develop-style
  • 设计 token 统一(upload + admin + results)
  • Drag-reorder buckets + thumb ?w= 优化
  • Hold-Space cheat sheet
